description_long: This object is a compact, single-action revolver-style handgun with a metallic frame and a wooden grip. The frame and barrel are primarily composed of a matte silver-gray metal, while the cylinder and some internal components are finished in a brass or gold tone. The grip is smoothly contoured, made of polished wood, and seamlessly integrated into the frame, providing a classic and ergonomic appearance. The trigger guard is large and rounded, constructed from the same metallic material as the frame, and the barrel is relatively short and unadorned, with a squared-off muzzle. There are no visible engravings, logos, or serial numbers on the exterior surfaces. The overall design is minimalistic, with a focus on clean lines and functional form.
description: A compact revolver-style handgun with a silver metallic frame, brass cylinder, and polished wooden grip. The design is minimalistic and classic, with a large rounded trigger guard and a short, unmarked barrel.
description_view_0: This view highlights the smooth wooden grip, the metallic frame, and the prominent brass cylinder, with the large rounded trigger guard clearly visible.
description_view_1: From this angle, the barrel's squared-off muzzle and the dual chambers of the brass cylinder are visible, along with the top of the frame and the rear sight area.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the length of the barrel, the integration of the brass cylinder, and the seamless transition between the wooden grip and the metallic frame.
description_view_3: The rear of the handgun is shown, focusing on the broad wooden grip and the back of the brass cylinder, with the trigger guard partially visible.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is smoothly contoured and made of polished wood, featuring a gentle curve that fits comfortably in the hand. Its surface is untextured, lacking checkering or stippling, and it has a natural wood grain finish that adds a classic aesthetic. The grip is broad and slightly rounded, with no visible finger grooves, logos, or embellishments, emphasizing simplicity and ergonomic comfort.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is large, rounded, and constructed from the same metallic material as the frame. It has a smooth, continuous curve with moderate thickness, providing ample space for finger placement. There are no undercuts, squared-off edges, or integrated accessories, and the surface is plain without any visible texturing or reinforcement.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and straight with a squared-off muzzle, lacking any threading, porting, or external features such as compensators. Its profile is simple and unadorned, with a matte metallic finish and no visible markings or decorative elements.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide or any other part of the handgun. The exterior surfaces are plain and free of manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or decorative patterns.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is not externally visible, as this is a revolver-style handgun with an integrated cylinder rather than a detachable magazine. There are no floorplates, finger rests, or distinctive base features present.
